name: Female Gardevoir
description: A female Gardevoir lives in one of the castle gardens in Wyndon, in the Galar region. She has lived there since she was a Ralts and was left there by her old Pokémon trainer. Her appearance is unique and radiant. She rarely shows herself. She often stays around the many gazebos that adorn the gardens. Although she seems a little shy, she enjoys tending to all the flowers in the parks.
creator: GShephArt
